TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kuhkuh, title = kuhkuh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kuhkuh} }

S.FORM: kuhkuh kasasumay :kasazumaay aadupan Animalia sacumud :sacumud dami'ay aadupan Mollusca uzip :uzip bili ku sapiculil Gastropoda mata :mata dawmiay uzip Architaenioglossa pulung :pulung samataan kuhkuh Viviparoidea samataan :samataan kuhkuh Viviparidae kuhkuh caay kuyni u sapamataan a kuhkuh dada' "mitesakay nipangangan Viviparidae" u bili ku sapiculil dawmiay' uzai aadupan. palalecad hatiza u taludu' katabaki, sipudac ku banges cisataheb. kacumuli sapamata kuhkuh aadipad a nipangangan. yadah ku i abesaay nanumay a butingan manamuh mukan tu kuhkuh. labu nu uzip a kuhkuh madayum sicilekay. kasazuma nu kuhkuh tungus malumanay nuayawan silingasaay a uzip, sapamata kuhkuh imahini u dawmi'ay uzip a sakaput, pakala tu 17 a tungusay , cacay a lasubu a masasengiay . tungusay kimulmulay kuhkuh ŚúďÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨(Cipangopaludina), (Cipangopaludina chinensis),śĽáśĪ†ŚúďÁĒįŤěļ (Cipangopaludina dianchiensis), ÁÄēŚćĪÁ®úÁĒįŤěļ(Cipangopaludina miyagii), Cipangopaludina compactus, Cipangopaludina formosensis, Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨(Sinotaia),Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ (Sinotaia quadrata),ťõôŚł∂Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ(Sinotaia lapidea),ŤěļÁīčÁü≥ÁĒįŤěļ(Sinotaia quadrata heudei),Sinotaia quadrata aeruginosa. tungusay kimulmulay kuhkuh (Cipangopaludina) tungusay malumanay nikalukan umah tungusay kuhkuh, pasu mahiniay canacanan nu mauzipay: Cung-kuw kimulmulan kuhkuh (kimmulmulay a kuhkuh, šł≠ŚúčŚúďÁĒįŤěļ) (Cipangopaludina chinensis), tyen-ce a taku u kimulmulay a kuhkuh (śĽáśĪ†ŚúďÁĒįŤěļ, Cipangopaludina dianchiensis), kalihanawan u masamucuyay a kuhkuh (ÁÄēŚćĪÁ®úÁĒįŤěļ, Cipangopaludina miyagii), Cipangopaludina compactus, Cipangopaludina formosensis, tungusay masabucu'yay ku kimulmul a kuhkuh (Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨, Sinotaia), masabucuyay kimulmulay kuhkuh (masataliyukay ku kamucuy a kuhkuh, ÁíįÁ®úŤěļ) (Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia quadrata), tusaay kasataluyuk nu masabucuyay a kuhkuh (ťõôŚł∂Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia lapidea), masataluyuk ku mucuy nu ikul a kuhkuh (ŤěļÁīčÁü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia quadrata heudei), Sinotaia quadrata aeruginosa. ,śģľťęėÁīĄ4cm. . kimulmulay kuhkuh kuki' masamulmul ku ti'kuk, kimulmul ku satungdud nu uzip, laway nu kuki' masakimulmul. kuki' makulah ku kulit anucaay sa makulaha ku landaw, lameneng takelal, talakau nu kuki' 4cm. sataheb a pudac mala kulahay ku kalawlaw nu kulit izaw ku masamulmulay a kulit masabalucu' ku kamulmul nu kulit a zazan. masabucuyay kuhkuh singangan aca tu masabucuyay kuhkuha anucaay sa masataliyukay ku kamucuy a kuhkuh, kuki' ka adidi'ay tu kimulmulan kuhkuh nika masatanayu' ku kuki', tapiingan a bucuy, u kuki' duuduuta ku kaladaway anucaay sa sakulakulahan ku kaladaway, 2.5cm ku talakaw nu kuki'. kaliwaliwah i kananaman kaliwaliwah nu kuhkuh mahamin izaw i kitakit, maazih tu i Uw-cuw, Ya-cuw, Bey-cuw Tung- Nan-ya atu Pey-me-cuw a nuwalian atu Ku-pa a kakitizaan a sauwac, taku atu laku liwliw nu abesaay a nanum. tunu wawa sa. manamuh ku kuhkuh mauzip i lanulanu'an, i labu nu nanum damay anucaay sa u laclac mala u kakanen. uzip nu ulang kawili a ngawa' u sapitakis tu uzang. i bili misati'kuk. misalalami' miciyan tu kuhkuh u kanamuhan nu Cuw-kuw nutimulan asuay a kakanan. Kuwng-si Liw-cuw walay a kuhkuh u nisakabian a kuhkuh. nika nu canacanan ku sapalamel, kanca ngaayen ku kuhkuh, sakasaan a malalid nu cilekay. amalaheci . Taywan nauyaan u "kimulmulay kuhkuh" amalaheci ku nidipat pipahabayan, taneng henay a yadah ku nipahabanay, nipahabanay katukuh siwa a kacakat. ayzaay tu a mihcaan Nung-wi-huy pipahabayan sakalamkam sa mikawaw misuped pahabay tu sapaluma sa, nacila (cacay a demiad) pasubana' malaheci tu ku nipahabay tu kimulmulay kuhkuhk, yadah satu ku kuhkuh, u nipahabayay kacakat katukuh i siwaay. imahin pipahabayan patahkal a pacakay tu canacananan a kuhkuhan, mibangbang tu binawlan mikawaw pahabay anucaay pakayadah tu kuhkuh, anuayaw adasay mala u cayay tu ka azih i Taywan, u siacaay a nilacu nu uyaayay tu nu mauzipay, katukuh tu nipahabay atu nipacakay asinilacul tu. . caay ku nipasapaiyuan atu nu tauay a kuhkuh, kimulmulay a kuhkuh umahay zumaay a kuhkuh maselep tu. . kimulmulay kuhkuh nu Taywan tabakiay nu yaanay tu abesaay nanum a kuhkuh, satabakiay katukuh 7-8 hunan, imahini u makanay tu nu tademaw amin u masabucuyay kimulmulay kuhkuh, u satabakiay a uzip 3-4 hunan dada'. pipahabayan a mikeliday ci Cen-cin-zu hini sa, makay "cacay a kuhkuh siwa kaysing ku kabi" uynian a kamu taneng maazihay tu, iayaw kimulmulay kuhkuh nu Taywan u kahenulan nu nanumay a kakanan. sangaleh malukay syakayay mahizatu, ayzaay tu a mihcaan namapatadas nu tademaw, masazuma tu ku liwliw caay tu kaazih ku nu tiniay tu nuyaanay tu nanumay mauzipay nu tauay aca a kuhkuh. satu, pipahabayay kalamkam satu mikawaw tu kimulmulay kuhkuh, kahenulan a misupet tu tiniay mauzipay i nanum, misuped pahabay. iayaw kimulmulay kuhkuh angangan mauzip i taku, kapisun a laku atu nipalumaan tu tipus a umah. pipahabayay sakatusa nu mikeliday mitelacay a tademaw ci Cen-kuwn-zu pipudac niza u kimulmulay kuhkuh tusa ku angangan kahini kalamkam a masele, saka cacay malukay ku azihen, pasapaiyu mapauning tu ku nanum caay tu kauzip ku kuhkuhk, sakatusa bu-su'-lu a kuhkuhan macacabi' tu nu tauay a mauzipay, u kalamkam a siwawa sa, cacay ku bu-su'-lu cacay a mihcaan nilecuhan tulu a mangan ku kuhkuh, cacay ku kimulmulay kuhkuh cacay a mihcaan 200 dada' ku nilecuhan a kuhkuh. iayaw "ayaw nu 1971 a mihcaan" i umah yadah ku pisapudan tu kakanan a kuhkuh, mipudac itawya taneng a mahini sa. kasumamadanay a cilis i kaelacad izaw tu kunisuped tu nanum, caay padamek henay atu caay henay pisapaiyu. kahenulan u kakuti' nu nanum, malecaday a cilis, sadingsingan, balangbangan tusa a puu' kasikuhkuhan, u lalud kalahadan nu bu-suw-lu. sayhan u kuhkuh u tatungus pahabay u akuti' i 23-28‚ĄÉ. pahabayan a kakitizaan kuhkuh icelang ku nikauzip atu icelang mitena' tu imelang, i sinanumay a cilis, laku, taku taneng mipazeng pahabay, u zuma i taku han pahabay, misabacalbacal tu taku tabakiay adidi'ay pasasizuma pahabay, tamelacay a taku, nisulimetan a taku ku sapahabay, u tesek nu kailabu labu kacacayat tu akuti' nu kasienawan kasapi' nu lalud. nika paayaw tu kaliyuhan a sapacilal, u kailabu nu nanum sakapahay i 70cm, mahiza sa pasalilel ku liwliw, sacaay pilaliw nu kuhkuh. i hekal nu nanum taneng pahabay tu munabaway a lutuk, kakanan nu kuhkuh, sa pahecek han i teban tu auk sazepitan nu damay mulangaw, kakanan nu kuhkuh, papahanhanan nu kuhkuh atu kasiti'kukan. pahabay tu sapal a kawaw nanilisimetay ku taku, u zuma mipili' i 4-11 a bulad malingatu pahabay tu sapul. paymihcaan tu 6-9 a bulad u puu' nu kasibekan nu kuhkuh a siti'kuk, katukuh i Nan-tuw a kuwan Pu-li a sauwac anucaay sa tayza i Pu-li a iciba micakay tu kimulmulay a kuhkuh. kilul tu nipalalecad 2:1 ku uzang ulang, pakayni i pipili' tu 15-20g ku uzang a kuhkuh pazeng han i taku, payli-bang-mi ku nanum pazeng han tu 10 a kuhkuhan uzang a kuhkuh taneng tu, adidi'ay a kuhkuh caliway tu cacay a mihcaan kunipahabay taneng tu alaen pacakay. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: kuńßkuńß kasasumaj :kasazumaaj aadupan animar~…ĺia sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud dami Ē~ °aj aadupan mor~…ĺr~…ĺus ¶a uzip :uzip bir~…ĺi ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ gastropoda mata :mata dawmiaj uzip ar ¶ńßita…ôniogr~…ĺossa pur~…ĺuŇč :pur~…ĺuŇč samataan kuńßkuńß *i*iparoid…ôa samataan :samataan kuńßkuńß *i*iparida…ô kuńßkuńß ¶aaj kujni u sapamataan a kuńßkuńß dada Ē~ ° "mit…ôsakaj nipaŇčaŇčan *i*iparida…ô" u bir~…ĺi ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ dawmiaj Ē~ ° uzai aadupan. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßatiza u tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° katabaki, sipuda ¶ ku baŇč…ôs ¶isatańß…ôb. ka ¶umur~…ĺi sapamata kuńßkuńß aadipad a nipaŇčaŇčan. jadańß ku i ab…ôsaaj nanumaj a butiŇčan manamuńß mukan tu kuńßkuńß. r~…ĺabu nu uzip a kuńßkuńß madajum si ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. kasazuma nu kuńßkuńß tuŇčus mar~…ĺumanaj nuajawan sir~…ĺiŇčasaaj a uzip, sapamata kuńßkuńß imańßini u dawmi Ē~ °aj uzip a sakaput, pakar~…ĺa tu ** a tuŇčusaj , ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a masas…ôŇčiaj . tuŇčusaj kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß ****( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina), ( ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nuŇč-wi-ńßuj pipańßabajan sakar~…ĺamkam sa mikawaw misup…ôd pańßabaj tu sapar~…ĺuma sa, na ¶ir~…ĺa ( ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad) pasubana Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu ku nipańßabaj tu ¶a a kuńßkuńß. satu, pipańßabajaj kar~…ĺamkam satu mikawaw tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß, kańß…ônur~…ĺan a misup…ôt tu tiniaj mauzipaj i nanum, misup…ôd pańßabaj. iajaw kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß aŇčaŇčan mauzip i taku, kapisun a r~…ĺaku atu nipar~…ĺumaan tu tipus a umańß. pipańßabajaj sakatusa nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj mit…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-kuwn-zu pipuda ¶ niza u kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß tusa ku aŇčaŇčan kańßini kar~…ĺamkam a mas…ôr~…ĺ…ô, saka ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺukaj ku azińß…ôn, pasapaiju mapauniŇč tu ku nanum ¶aaj tu kauzip ku kuńßkuńßk, sakatusa bu-su Ē~ °-r~…ĺu a kuńßkuńßan ma ¶a ¶abi Ē~ ° tu nu tauaj a mauzipaj, u kar~…ĺamkam a siwawa sa, ¶a ¶aj ku bu-su Ē~ °-r~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tur~…ĺu a maŇčan ku kuńßkuńß, ¶a ¶aj ku kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan *** dada Ē~ ° ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a kuńßkuńß. iajaw "ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan" i umańß jadańß ku pisapudan tu kakanan a kuńßkuńß, mipuda ¶ itawja tan…ôŇč a mańßini sa. kasumamadanaj a ¶ir~…ĺis i ka…ôr~…ĺa ¶ad izaw tu kunisup…ôd tu nanum, ¶aaj padam…ôk ńß…ônaj atu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pisapaiju. kańß…ônur~…ĺan u kakuti Ē~ ° nu nanum, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ¶ir~…ĺis, sadiŇčsiŇčan, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa a puu Ē~ ° kasikuńßkuńßan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺud kar~…ĺańßadan nu bu-suw-r~…ĺu. sajńßan u kuńßkuńß u tatuŇčus pańßabaj u akuti Ē~ ° i **-***. pańßabajan a kakitizaan kuńßkuńß i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nikauzip atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, i sinanumaj a ¶ir~…ĺis, r~…ĺaku, taku tan…ôŇč mipaz…ôŇč pańßabaj, u zuma i taku ńßan pańßabaj, misaba ¶ar~…ĺba ¶ar~…ĺ tu taku tabakiaj adidi Ē~ °aj pasasizuma pańßabaj, tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a taku, nisur~…ĺim…ôtan a taku ku sapańßabaj, u t…ôs…ôk nu kair~…ĺabu r~…ĺabu ka ¶a ¶ajat tu akuti Ē~ ° nu kasi…ônawan kasapi Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺud. nika paajaw tu kar~…ĺijuńßan a sapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, u kair~…ĺabu nu nanum sakapańßaj i ** ¶m, mańßiza sa pasar~…ĺir~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, sa ¶aaj pir~…ĺar~…ĺiw nu kuńßkuńß. i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nanum tan…ôŇč pańßabaj tu munabawaj a r~…ĺutuk, kakanan nu kuńßkuńß, sa pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan i t…ôban tu auk saz…ôpitan nu damaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw, kakanan nu kuńßkuńß, papańßanńßanan nu kuńßkuńß atu kasiti Ē~ °kukan. pańßabaj tu sapar~…ĺ a kawaw nanir~…ĺisim…ôtaj ku taku, u zuma mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° i *-** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pańßabaj tu sapur~…ĺ. pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad u puu Ē~ ° nu kasib…ôkan nu kuńßkuńß a siti Ē~ °kuk, katukuńß i nan-tuw a kuwan pu-r~…ĺi a sauwa ¶ anu ¶aaj sa tajza i pu-r~…ĺi a i ¶iba mi ¶akaj tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nipar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad *:* ku uzaŇč ur~…ĺaŇč, pakajni i pipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu **-**g ku uzaŇč a kuńßkuńß paz…ôŇč ńßan i taku, pajr~…ĺi-baŇč-mi ku nanum paz…ôŇč ńßan tu ** a kuńßkuńßan uzaŇč a kuńßkuńß tan…ôŇč tu, adidi Ē~ °aj a kuńßkuńß ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kunipańßabaj tan…ôŇč tu ar~…ĺa…ôn pa ¶akaj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: kuhkuh kasasumay :kasazumaay aadupan Animalia sacumud :sacumud dami'ay aadupan Mollusca uzip :uzip bili ku sapiculil Gastropoda mata :mata dawmiay uzip Architaenioglossa pulung :pulung samataan kuhkuh Viviparoidea samataan :samataan kuhkuh Viviparidae kuhkuh caay kuyni u sapamataan a kuhkuh dada' "mitesakay nipangangan Viviparidae" u bili ku sapiculil dawmiay' uzai aadupan. palalecad hatiza u taludu' katabaki, sipudac ku banges cisataheb. kacumuli sapamata kuhkuh aadipad a nipangangan. yadah ku i abesaay nanumay a butingan manamuh mukan tu kuhkuh. labu nu uzip a kuhkuh madayum sicilekay. kasazuma nu kuhkuh tungus malumanay nuayawan silingasaay a uzip, sapamata kuhkuh imahini u dawmi'ay uzip a sakaput, pakala tu 17 a tungusay , cacay a lasubu a masasengiay . tungusay kimulmulay kuhkuh ŚúďÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨(Cipangopaludina), (Cipangopaludina chinensis),śĽáśĪ†ŚúďÁĒįŤěļ (Cipangopaludina dianchiensis), ÁÄēŚćĪÁ®úÁĒįŤěļ(Cipangopaludina miyagii), Cipangopaludina compactus, Cipangopaludina formosensis, Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨(Sinotaia),Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ (Sinotaia quadrata),ťõôŚł∂Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ(Sinotaia lapidea),ŤěļÁīčÁü≥ÁĒįŤěļ(Sinotaia quadrata heudei),Sinotaia quadrata aeruginosa. tungusay kimulmulay kuhkuh (Cipangopaludina) tungusay malumanay nikalukan umah tungusay kuhkuh, pasu mahiniay canacanan nu mauzipay: Cung-kuw kimulmulan kuhkuh (kimmulmulay a kuhkuh, šł≠ŚúčŚúďÁĒįŤěļ) (Cipangopaludina chinensis), tyen-ce a taku u kimulmulay a kuhkuh (śĽáśĪ†ŚúďÁĒįŤěļ, Cipangopaludina dianchiensis), kalihanawan u masamucuyay a kuhkuh (ÁÄēŚćĪÁ®úÁĒįŤěļ, Cipangopaludina miyagii), Cipangopaludina compactus, Cipangopaludina formosensis, tungusay masabucu'yay ku kimulmul a kuhkuh (Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļŚĪ¨, Sinotaia), masabucuyay kimulmulay kuhkuh (masataliyukay ku kamucuy a kuhkuh, ÁíįÁ®úŤěļ) (Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia quadrata), tusaay kasataluyuk nu masabucuyay a kuhkuh (ťõôŚł∂Áü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia lapidea), masataluyuk ku mucuy nu ikul a kuhkuh (ŤěļÁīčÁü≥ÁĒįŤěļ, Sinotaia quadrata heudei), Sinotaia quadrata aeruginosa. ,śģľťęėÁīĄ4cm. . kimulmulay kuhkuh kuki' masamulmul ku ti'kuk, kimulmul ku satungdud nu uzip, laway nu kuki' masakimulmul. kuki' makulah ku kulit anucaay sa makulaha ku landaw, lameneng takelal, talakau nu kuki' 4cm. sataheb a pudac mala kulahay ku kalawlaw nu kulit izaw ku masamulmulay a kulit masabalucu' ku kamulmul nu kulit a zazan. masabucuyay kuhkuh singangan aca tu masabucuyay kuhkuha anucaay sa masataliyukay ku kamucuy a kuhkuh, kuki' ka adidi'ay tu kimulmulan kuhkuh nika masatanayu' ku kuki', tapiingan a bucuy, u kuki' duuduuta ku kaladaway anucaay sa sakulakulahan ku kaladaway, 2.5cm ku talakaw nu kuki'. kaliwaliwah i kananaman kaliwaliwah nu kuhkuh mahamin izaw i kitakit, maazih tu i Uw-cuw, Ya-cuw, Bey-cuw Tung- Nan-ya atu Pey-me-cuw a nuwalian atu Ku-pa a kakitizaan a sauwac, taku atu laku liwliw nu abesaay a nanum. tunu wawa sa. manamuh ku kuhkuh mauzip i lanulanu'an, i labu nu nanum damay anucaay sa u laclac mala u kakanen. uzip nu ulang kawili a ngawa' u sapitakis tu uzang. i bili misati'kuk. misalalami' miciyan tu kuhkuh u kanamuhan nu Cuw-kuw nutimulan asuay a kakanan. Kuwng-si Liw-cuw walay a kuhkuh u nisakabian a kuhkuh. nika nu canacanan ku sapalamel, kanca ngaayen ku kuhkuh, sakasaan a malalid nu cilekay. amalaheci . Taywan nauyaan u "kimulmulay kuhkuh" amalaheci ku nidipat pipahabayan, taneng henay a yadah ku nipahabanay, nipahabanay katukuh siwa a kacakat. ayzaay tu a mihcaan Nung-wi-huy pipahabayan sakalamkam sa mikawaw misuped pahabay tu sapaluma sa, nacila (cacay a demiad) pasubana' malaheci tu ku nipahabay tu kimulmulay kuhkuhk, yadah satu ku kuhkuh, u nipahabayay kacakat katukuh i siwaay. imahin pipahabayan patahkal a pacakay tu canacananan a kuhkuhan, mibangbang tu binawlan mikawaw pahabay anucaay pakayadah tu kuhkuh, anuayaw adasay mala u cayay tu ka azih i Taywan, u siacaay a nilacu nu uyaayay tu nu mauzipay, katukuh tu nipahabay atu nipacakay asinilacul tu. . caay ku nipasapaiyuan atu nu tauay a kuhkuh, kimulmulay a kuhkuh umahay zumaay a kuhkuh maselep tu. . kimulmulay kuhkuh nu Taywan tabakiay nu yaanay tu abesaay nanum a kuhkuh, satabakiay katukuh 7-8 hunan, imahini u makanay tu nu tademaw amin u masabucuyay kimulmulay kuhkuh, u satabakiay a uzip 3-4 hunan dada'. pipahabayan a mikeliday ci Cen-cin-zu hini sa, makay "cacay a kuhkuh siwa kaysing ku kabi" uynian a kamu taneng maazihay tu, iayaw kimulmulay kuhkuh nu Taywan u kahenulan nu nanumay a kakanan. sangaleh malukay syakayay mahizatu, ayzaay tu a mihcaan namapatadas nu tademaw, masazuma tu ku liwliw caay tu kaazih ku nu tiniay tu nuyaanay tu nanumay mauzipay nu tauay aca a kuhkuh. satu, pipahabayay kalamkam satu mikawaw tu kimulmulay kuhkuh, kahenulan a misupet tu tiniay mauzipay i nanum, misuped pahabay. iayaw kimulmulay kuhkuh angangan mauzip i taku, kapisun a laku atu nipalumaan tu tipus a umah. pipahabayay sakatusa nu mikeliday mitelacay a tademaw ci Cen-kuwn-zu pipudac niza u kimulmulay kuhkuh tusa ku angangan kahini kalamkam a masele, saka cacay malukay ku azihen, pasapaiyu mapauning tu ku nanum caay tu kauzip ku kuhkuhk, sakatusa bu-su'-lu a kuhkuhan macacabi' tu nu tauay a mauzipay, u kalamkam a siwawa sa, cacay ku bu-su'-lu cacay a mihcaan nilecuhan tulu a mangan ku kuhkuh, cacay ku kimulmulay kuhkuh cacay a mihcaan 200 dada' ku nilecuhan a kuhkuh. iayaw "ayaw nu 1971 a mihcaan" i umah yadah ku pisapudan tu kakanan a kuhkuh, mipudac itawya taneng a mahini sa. kasumamadanay a cilis i kaelacad izaw tu kunisuped tu nanum, caay padamek henay atu caay henay pisapaiyu. kahenulan u kakuti' nu nanum, malecaday a cilis, sadingsingan, balangbangan tusa a puu' kasikuhkuhan, u lalud kalahadan nu bu-suw-lu. sayhan u kuhkuh u tatungus pahabay u akuti' i 23-28‚ĄÉ. pahabayan a kakitizaan kuhkuh icelang ku nikauzip atu icelang mitena' tu imelang, i sinanumay a cilis, laku, taku taneng mipazeng pahabay, u zuma i taku han pahabay, misabacalbacal tu taku tabakiay adidi'ay pasasizuma pahabay, tamelacay a taku, nisulimetan a taku ku sapahabay, u tesek nu kailabu labu kacacayat tu akuti' nu kasienawan kasapi' nu lalud. nika paayaw tu kaliyuhan a sapacilal, u kailabu nu nanum sakapahay i 70cm, mahiza sa pasalilel ku liwliw, sacaay pilaliw nu kuhkuh. i hekal nu nanum taneng pahabay tu munabaway a lutuk, kakanan nu kuhkuh, sa pahecek han i teban tu auk sazepitan nu damay mulangaw, kakanan nu kuhkuh, papahanhanan nu kuhkuh atu kasiti'kukan. pahabay tu sapal a kawaw nanilisimetay ku taku, u zuma mipili' i 4-11 a bulad malingatu pahabay tu sapul. paymihcaan tu 6-9 a bulad u puu' nu kasibekan nu kuhkuh a siti'kuk, katukuh i Nan-tuw a kuwan Pu-li a sauwac anucaay sa tayza i Pu-li a iciba micakay tu kimulmulay a kuhkuh. kilul tu nipalalecad 2:1 ku uzang ulang, pakayni i pipili' tu 15-20g ku uzang a kuhkuh pazeng han i taku, payli-bang-mi ku nanum pazeng han tu 10 a kuhkuhan uzang a kuhkuh taneng tu, adidi'ay a kuhkuh caliway tu cacay a mihcaan kunipahabay taneng tu alaen pacakay. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: kuńßkuńß kasasumaj :kasazumaaj aadupan animar~…ĺia sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud dami Ē~ °aj aadupan mor~…ĺr~…ĺus ¶a uzip :uzip bir~…ĺi ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ gastropoda mata :mata dawmiaj uzip ar ¶ńßita…ôniogr~…ĺossa pur~…ĺuŇč :pur~…ĺuŇč samataan kuńßkuńß *i*iparoid…ôa samataan :samataan kuńßkuńß *i*iparida…ô kuńßkuńß ¶aaj kujni u sapamataan a kuńßkuńß dada Ē~ ° "mit…ôsakaj nipaŇčaŇčan *i*iparida…ô" u bir~…ĺi ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ dawmiaj Ē~ ° uzai aadupan. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßatiza u tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° katabaki, sipuda ¶ ku baŇč…ôs ¶isatańß…ôb. ka ¶umur~…ĺi sapamata kuńßkuńß aadipad a nipaŇčaŇčan. jadańß ku i ab…ôsaaj nanumaj a butiŇčan manamuńß mukan tu kuńßkuńß. r~…ĺabu nu uzip a kuńßkuńß madajum si ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. kasazuma nu kuńßkuńß tuŇčus mar~…ĺumanaj nuajawan sir~…ĺiŇčasaaj a uzip, sapamata kuńßkuńß imańßini u dawmi Ē~ °aj uzip a sakaput, pakar~…ĺa tu ** a tuŇčusaj , ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a masas…ôŇčiaj . tuŇčusaj kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß ****( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina), ( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina ¶ńßin…ônsis),***** ( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina dian ¶ńßi…ônsis), *****( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina mijagii), ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina ¶ompa ¶tus, ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina formos…ônsis, ****(sinotaia),*** (sinotaia *uadrata),*****(sinotaia r~…ĺapid…ôa),*****(sinotaia *uadrata ńß…ôud…ôi),sinotaia *uadrata a…ôruginosa. tuŇčusaj kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß ( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina) tuŇčusaj mar~…ĺumanaj nikar~…ĺukan umańß tuŇčusaj kuńßkuńß, pasu mańßiniaj ¶ana ¶anan nu mauzipaj: ¶uŇč-kuw kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺan kuńßkuńß (kimmur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß, *****) ( ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina ¶ńßin…ônsis), tj…ôn- ¶…ô a taku u kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß (*****, ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina dian ¶ńßi…ônsis), kar~…ĺińßanawan u masamu ¶ujaj a kuńßkuńß (*****, ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina mijagii), ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina ¶ompa ¶tus, ¶ipaŇčopar~…ĺudina formos…ônsis, tuŇčusaj masabu ¶u Ē~ °jaj ku kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ a kuńßkuńß (****, sinotaia), masabu ¶ujaj kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß (masatar~…ĺijukaj ku kamu ¶uj a kuńßkuńß, ***) (***, sinotaia *uadrata), tusaaj kasatar~…ĺujuk nu masabu ¶ujaj a kuńßkuńß (*****, sinotaia r~…ĺapid…ôa), masatar~…ĺujuk ku mu ¶uj nu ikur~…ĺ a kuńßkuńß (*****, sinotaia *uadrata ńß…ôud…ôi), sinotaia *uadrata a…ôruginosa. ,**** ¶m. . kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß kuki Ē~ ° masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku ti Ē~ °kuk, kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku satuŇčdud nu uzip, r~…ĺawaj nu kuki Ē~ ° masakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ. kuki Ē~ ° makur~…ĺańß ku kur~…ĺit anu ¶aaj sa makur~…ĺańßa ku r~…ĺandaw, r~…ĺam…ôn…ôŇč tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ, tar~…ĺakau nu kuki Ē~ ° * ¶m. satańß…ôb a puda ¶ mar~…ĺa kur~…ĺańßaj ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw nu kur~…ĺit izaw ku masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kur~…ĺit masabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ nu kur~…ĺit a zazan. masabu ¶ujaj kuńßkuńß siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu masabu ¶ujaj kuńßkuńßa anu ¶aaj sa masatar~…ĺijukaj ku kamu ¶uj a kuńßkuńß, kuki Ē~ ° ka adidi Ē~ °aj tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺan kuńßkuńß nika masatanaju Ē~ ° ku kuki Ē~ °, tapiiŇčan a bu ¶uj, u kuki Ē~ ° duuduuta ku kar~…ĺadawaj anu ¶aaj sa sakur~…ĺakur~…ĺańßan ku kar~…ĺadawaj, *.* ¶m ku tar~…ĺakaw nu kuki Ē~ °. kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i kananaman kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß nu kuńßkuńß mańßamin izaw i kitakit, maazińß tu i uw- ¶uw, ja- ¶uw, b…ô- ¶uw tuŇč- nan-ja atu p…ô-m…ô- ¶uw a nuwar~…ĺian atu ku-pa a kakitizaan a sauwa ¶, taku atu r~…ĺaku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ab…ôsaaj a nanum. tunu wawa sa. manamuńß ku kuńßkuńß mauzip i r~…ĺanur~…ĺanu Ē~ °an, i r~…ĺabu nu nanum damaj anu ¶aaj sa u r~…ĺa ¶r~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺa u kakan…ôn. uzip nu ur~…ĺaŇč kawir~…ĺi a Ňčawa Ē~ ° u sapitakis tu uzaŇč. i bir~…ĺi misati Ē~ °kuk. misar~…ĺar~…ĺami Ē~ ° mi ¶ijan tu kuńßkuńß u kanamuńßan nu ¶uw-kuw nutimur~…ĺan asuaj a kakanan. kuwŇč-si r~…ĺiw- ¶uw war~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß u nisakabian a kuńßkuńß. nika nu ¶ana ¶anan ku sapar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ, kan ¶a Ňčaaj…ôn ku kuńßkuńß, sakasaan a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. amar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i . tajwan naujaan u "kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß" amar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nidipat pipańßabajan, tan…ôŇč ńß…ônaj a jadańß ku nipańßabanaj, nipańßabanaj katukuńß siwa a ka ¶akat. ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan nuŇč-wi-ńßuj pipańßabajan sakar~…ĺamkam sa mikawaw misup…ôd pańßabaj tu sapar~…ĺuma sa, na ¶ir~…ĺa ( ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad) pasubana Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu ku nipańßabaj tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńßk, jadańß satu ku kuńßkuńß, u nipańßabajaj ka ¶akat katukuńß i siwaaj. imańßin pipańßabajan patańßkar~…ĺ a pa ¶akaj tu ¶ana ¶ananan a kuńßkuńßan, mibaŇčbaŇč tu binawr~…ĺan mikawaw pańßabaj anu ¶aaj pakajadańß tu kuńßkuńß, anuajaw adasaj mar~…ĺa u ¶ajaj tu ka azińß i tajwan, u sia ¶aaj a nir~…ĺa ¶u nu ujaajaj tu nu mauzipaj, katukuńß tu nipańßabaj atu nipa ¶akaj asinir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu. . ¶aaj ku nipasapaijuan atu nu tauaj a kuńßkuńß, kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß umańßaj zumaaj a kuńßkuńß mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu. . kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß nu tajwan tabakiaj nu jaanaj tu ab…ôsaaj nanum a kuńßkuńß, satabakiaj katukuńß *-* ńßunan, imańßini u makanaj tu nu tad…ômaw amin u masabu ¶ujaj kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß, u satabakiaj a uzip *-* ńßunan dada Ē~ °. pipańßabajan a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ¶…ôn- ¶in-zu ńßini sa, makaj " ¶a ¶aj a kuńßkuńß siwa kajsiŇč ku kabi" ujnian a kamu tan…ôŇč maazińßaj tu, iajaw kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß nu tajwan u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu nanumaj a kakanan. saŇčar~…ĺ…ôńß mar~…ĺukaj sjakajaj mańßizatu, ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan namapatadas nu tad…ômaw, masazuma tu ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw ¶aaj tu kaazińß ku nu tiniaj tu nujaanaj tu nanumaj mauzipaj nu tauaj a ¶a a kuńßkuńß. satu, pipańßabajaj kar~…ĺamkam satu mikawaw tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß, kańß…ônur~…ĺan a misup…ôt tu tiniaj mauzipaj i nanum, misup…ôd pańßabaj. iajaw kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß aŇčaŇčan mauzip i taku, kapisun a r~…ĺaku atu nipar~…ĺumaan tu tipus a umańß. pipańßabajaj sakatusa nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj mit…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-kuwn-zu pipuda ¶ niza u kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß tusa ku aŇčaŇčan kańßini kar~…ĺamkam a mas…ôr~…ĺ…ô, saka ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺukaj ku azińß…ôn, pasapaiju mapauniŇč tu ku nanum ¶aaj tu kauzip ku kuńßkuńßk, sakatusa bu-su Ē~ °-r~…ĺu a kuńßkuńßan ma ¶a ¶abi Ē~ ° tu nu tauaj a mauzipaj, u kar~…ĺamkam a siwawa sa, ¶a ¶aj ku bu-su Ē~ °-r~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tur~…ĺu a maŇčan ku kuńßkuńß, ¶a ¶aj ku kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj kuńßkuńß ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan *** dada Ē~ ° ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a kuńßkuńß. iajaw "ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶aan" i umańß jadańß ku pisapudan tu kakanan a kuńßkuńß, mipuda ¶ itawja tan…ôŇč a mańßini sa. kasumamadanaj a ¶ir~…ĺis i ka…ôr~…ĺa ¶ad izaw tu kunisup…ôd tu nanum, ¶aaj padam…ôk ńß…ônaj atu ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pisapaiju. kańß…ônur~…ĺan u kakuti Ē~ ° nu nanum, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ¶ir~…ĺis, sadiŇčsiŇčan, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tusa a puu Ē~ ° kasikuńßkuńßan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺud kar~…ĺańßadan nu bu-suw-r~…ĺu. sajńßan u kuńßkuńß u tatuŇčus pańßabaj u akuti Ē~ ° i **-***. pańßabajan a kakitizaan kuńßkuńß i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nikauzip atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, i sinanumaj a ¶ir~…ĺis, r~…ĺaku, taku tan…ôŇč mipaz…ôŇč pańßabaj, u zuma i taku ńßan pańßabaj, misaba ¶ar~…ĺba ¶ar~…ĺ tu taku tabakiaj adidi Ē~ °aj pasasizuma pańßabaj, tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a taku, nisur~…ĺim…ôtan a taku ku sapańßabaj, u t…ôs…ôk nu kair~…ĺabu r~…ĺabu ka ¶a ¶ajat tu akuti Ē~ ° nu kasi…ônawan kasapi Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺud. nika paajaw tu kar~…ĺijuńßan a sapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, u kair~…ĺabu nu nanum sakapańßaj i ** ¶m, mańßiza sa pasar~…ĺir~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, sa ¶aaj pir~…ĺar~…ĺiw nu kuńßkuńß. i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nanum tan…ôŇč pańßabaj tu munabawaj a r~…ĺutuk, kakanan nu kuńßkuńß, sa pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan i t…ôban tu auk saz…ôpitan nu damaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw, kakanan nu kuńßkuńß, papańßanńßanan nu kuńßkuńß atu kasiti Ē~ °kukan. pańßabaj tu sapar~…ĺ a kawaw nanir~…ĺisim…ôtaj ku taku, u zuma mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° i *-** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pańßabaj tu sapur~…ĺ. pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad u puu Ē~ ° nu kasib…ôkan nu kuńßkuńß a siti Ē~ °kuk, katukuńß i nan-tuw a kuwan pu-r~…ĺi a sauwa ¶ anu ¶aaj sa tajza i pu-r~…ĺi a i ¶iba mi ¶akaj tu kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a kuńßkuńß. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nipar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad *:* ku uzaŇč ur~…ĺaŇč, pakajni i pipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu **-**g ku uzaŇč a kuńßkuńß paz…ôŇč ńßan i taku, pajr~…ĺi-baŇč-mi ku nanum paz…ôŇč ńßan tu ** a kuńßkuńßan uzaŇč a kuńßkuńß tan…ôŇč tu, adidi Ē~ °aj a kuńßkuńß ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kunipańßabaj tan…ôŇč tu ar~…ĺa…ôn pa ¶akaj. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
